text:
Kako (カコ, Kako) is the Private Guard of the Second Prince Camilla in charge of killing the Ninth Prince Halkenburg through a Nen curse. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 389 

Appearance

Kako is a young-looking individual with a long face, short, fair hair that curls at the top of their head, and freckles. They wear the standard uniform of Camilla's private guards. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

While Camilla is confined to a room in the VVIP area, Kako and most of her other bodyguards attend a meeting called by Sarahell about Shikaku's suicide. 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Kako is a Nen user and can cast the same curse as the other Have-Nots in Prince Camilla's employ. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

The furigana name of the Have-Nots' curse is derived from Japanese mythology, specifically to Izanami's inability to leave the underworld due to having eaten of its food.
The kanji name of the curse, "Tsujitsuma Awase ni Umareta Bokura", is derived from a song by Amazarashi.
Viz localized the curse's name as "Dust in the Wind: Hell Fruit".
